name: Game Devs of Color Expo 2026
description: The GDoCExpo conference highlights powerful talks and panels that are entertaining, thought-provoking, and empower our audience in games and beyond. Our online platform includes live chat, 1:1 meetings, job board, and game showcases with global reach for both released and upcoming games.
short_description: Powerful talks, panels, and game showcases celebrating and empowering game devs of color, with global reach.
